title: pteris cretica subsp. nipponica
intro: Pteris cretica subsp. nipponica is a subspecies of the fern genus Pteris, specifically native to East Asia, known for its unique fronds and medicinal properties. This fern is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Pteris cretica subsp. nipponica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs in traditional Japanese medicine, such as Kampo.
